description: Platform for ordering lab tests from multiple labs through single interface. Simplifies lab ordering workflow for functional medicine practitioners. Aggregates 20+ specialty lab companies into unified ordering and results platform.
business_model: B2B - Lab ordering platform to healthcare practitioners
target_market: Functional medicine practitioners, direct primary care, concierge medicine
key_investors: First Round Capital, General Catalyst, others
competitive_advantage: Single platform for specialty labs, simplified workflow, modern UX

varden_fit.rationale: Lab infrastructure - potential integration for occupational health lab ordering
